---
title: "Portfolio Computational Musicology"
author: "Nienke Maas"
date: "04/03/2026"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
editor: visual
---

# Corpus description

## Column (width=40%)
My corpus consists of all studio albums by Prince. 

### Row (height = 20%)

## Column (width=60%)
blabla
---
